expectations.text: References unattended mode (no pauses at any boundary)
expectations.evidence: Response explicitly states: 'Unattended mode: No pauses at task, story, or epic boundaries -- it will run straight through without waiting for human input.'

expectations.text: Configures parallel execution with multiple agents
expectations.evidence: Uses '-n 3' flag in the command and explains: 'Dispatches up to 3 implementer subagents simultaneously for independent tasks.'

expectations.text: Mentions or performs pre-flight checks before starting
expectations.evidence: No mention of pre-flight checks anywhere in the response. The response queries for epic/tasks (task discovery) but does not reference the pre-flight.sh hook, environment validation, git clean checks, disk space, or any other pre-flight validation. The response's own self-analysis confirms: 'Does not mention pre-flight checks at all.'

expectations.text: Describes how parallel tasks avoid dependencies or conflicts
expectations.evidence: Response states: 'Tasks with dependency relationships (via ohno's blockedBy graph) will be serialized automatically -- only independent tasks run in parallel.' However, it omits worktree isolation as a mechanism for avoiding file-level conflicts between parallel agents.

expectations.text: Plans for session summary or handoff notes at the end
expectations.evidence: Response mentions reviewing 'Any session summary output generated at session end' and 'The ohno task activity log for each completed task' as morning review items. However, the description is superficial -- it does not describe the structured session-summary.sh hook output format (token costs, tasks completed, chain metadata) or explicit handoff notes.
